retry_reason: kobject_put always succeeds and unconditionally decrements the refcount; retrying would be a double-put and is not intended.

judge.reason: Function is a deinitialization routine that calls multiple kobject_put operations on internal per-CPU and queue-level kobjects. Although its primary purpose is reference-count management (releasing kobject references), it is not a generic get/put/set wrapper for a single reference-counted object; it is a specific cleanup function with hardcoded object paths and no return or output of the critical variables to the caller.
